title: Durvalumab Plus Chemotherapy for Advanced Biliary Tract Cancer: A Post Hoc Analysis of the TOPAZ-1 Randomized Clinical Trial.
abstract: In the TOPAZ-1 trial's primary analysis, durvalumab plus gemcitabine and cisplatin (GemCis) showed statistically significant improved overall survival (OS) vs placebo plus GemCis with comparable safety between treatment groups in participants with advanced biliary tract cancer (aBTC). Durvalumab plus GemCis was recently established as the first-line standard of care among patients with aBTC.
